chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. S- 1153 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.01.2016 1. For Orders on Office Objection 2. For Katcha Peshi Mr. Safar Khokhar Junior Partner of Mr. Muhammad Ramzan Chandio, Advocate for petitioners is present Ch. Bashir Ahmed Asstt. A.G. a/w SIP Shafi Bangash for SSP Hyderabad and ASI Asghar Jamali for SHO PS Qasimabad, Hyderabad This petition is filed against the alleged harassment caused to the petitioners by respondent Nos. 3 to 5 as well as respondent No.6. Mr. Mumtaz Lashari, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.6 and states that no harassment has been caused to the petitioner by his client nor he intends to do so. Respondent No.3 is also present and denied the allegations. Learned A.A.G. states that no harassment has been caused to the petitioner by the official respondents nor they intend to do so. In the light of the above statement this petition stands disposed of. JUDGE *Karar/-
